title: [policy] Three-implementation parity compliance
description: Policy: Rust/Zephyr/Python are co-equal implementations. When they disagree, spec decides. MUST: shared test vectors (gbuw), feature matrix (k5zk), CI that tests all three against same vectors. When executing: compare feature coverage across implementations, create compliance bead per module.
close_reason: Verified compliant with tracked gaps. Policy infrastructure in place: shared test vectors exist in test/vectors/, Python is source of truth (README), CI tests all three impls. Gaps already tracked as sub-beads (1dj6 OSCORE, cdmc RPL, k5zk feature matrix). Child k5zk remains open for feature matrix work.
